title: bupleurum queri
intro: Bupleurum queri, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or thunder of god, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. Bupleurum queri is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Bupleurum queri include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although its safety and efficacy should be further studied.
